title: Saiko Lightsaber Pack
description: CIT pack to change swords and shields into lightsabers using anvil
body:
# 📝 Please note:
### 1. The pack is being ported over to Vanilla format so it no longer requires people to use mods like optifine or CITResewn. I will keep the old guide for the naming as the new format will look a little bit different for first version ditching the ability to choose custom colors until I make the adjustments
### 2. the models will recieve tweaks to make them appear more rounder, keeping the blocky style but making the cubes no longer have the same rotation as the previous ones
### 3. there is no need to use shaders or mods that add emissive texture since mojang added the ability to make parts of the models emissive


# [Vanilla Format (1.21.4 and onwards)]

##   [Aviavble Models]
- ``Anakin's Lightsaber`` [prev. "Blue Anakin"]
- ``Obi Wan's Lightsaber`` (alt. ``Obi Wan's 2nd Lightsaber``) [prev. "Blue Obi Wan 2"]
- ``Obi Wan's 1st Lightsaber`` [prev. "Blue Obi Wan 1"
- ``Luke's Lightsaber`` [prev. "Green Luke"]
- ``Kylo's Lightsaber`` [prev. "Red Kylo"]
- ``Maul's Lightsaber`` [prev. "Red Maul"]
- ``Inquisitor's Lightsaber`` [prev. "Red Inquisitor"]
- ``Darksaber`` [prev. "Dark Mando"]
- ``Custom Lightsaber`` [prev. "{any color} Custom"]

##   [New additions]
- ``Ezra's Lightsaber``
- ``Kanan's Lightsaber``
- ``Vader's Lightsaber``
- ``Windu's Lightsaber``

# [Optifine and CITResewn versions prior to Vanilla Item States (1.21.3 and downwards)]
# schemat for name is "anything you want" ["color" "model"]

use anvil to name iron/diamond/netherite sword or shield to change into lightsaber

and options for different parts are
colors:
- blue 
- green
- purple
- red
- yellow
- white
- dark [simply white outline with black center]
- rainbow [animated texture] /!\ might have some glitches /!\

================

upcoming 2.0 colors
- pink
- orange

================

models:
- anakin
- obi wan 1
- obi wan 2
- luke
- kylo
- maul
- mando
- dooku
- inquisitor
- custom

================

upcoming 2.0 handles
- vader
- windu
- kanan
- ezra

================

How to use resource pack

Optifine:
-Install optifine as client in your minecraft launcher

-use anvil to rename iron/diamond/netherite sword or shield
with format given above ["color" "model"]
{example "Blue Anakin"}

If the model doesn't show in game make sure to have custom items on in settings

If the blade of lightsaber doesn't glow
Make sure to e able emissive textures in settings

For shaders make sure shaders support LabPBR format and a able it in settings for shaderpack of your choice

Iris:
-install fabric mod loader
-install following
Iris, sodium, indium, CIT Resewn
Make sure Iris version is 1.5.0 or 1.5.2
1.5.1 had issues with PBR

-rename item in anvil

-use shaders that use PBR

If it doesn't work then check your cit Resewn config and if shaders you use support PBR
